prompt: Create a surreal forest with glowing flora.
prompt_refined: Generate a surreal forest landscape, drawing inspiration from image 1. The scene features a stylized, dark forest with tall, pointed trees prominently on both the left and right sides. In the foreground and mid-ground, vibrant reddish-orange flora clusters are scattered along the winding light grey river. The sky above transitions from a deep grey at the top to a warm, peachy orange near the horizon. Include the unique, wavy cloud shapes visible in the upper background of image 1.
objects: Tall, pointed trees on both the left and right sides
Sky transitioning from deep grey at the top to warm, peachy orange near the horizon
Unique, wavy cloud shapes in the upper background
